title: Add ckBTC, ckETH, and ckUSDC token symbols to the UI

requirements.text: Extend the token configuration to include a distinct human-friendly token symbol glyph for ckBTC, ckETH, and ckUSDC (e.g., ₿, Ξ, $, or other clearly recognizable glyphs) and expose a helper to retrieve it by token key.

quotes: are you able to add  ck BTC ck ETH ck USDC  token symbols

acceptanceCriteria: `frontend/src/config/tokens.ts` includes a new field on token configs (or a dedicated mapping) that provides a symbol glyph for ckBTC, ckETH, and ckUSDC.
There is a simple accessor (e.g., via `getTokenConfig` or a new helper) that the UI can use to fetch the glyph for a given token key.
Existing token configuration checks and existing properties (name, symbol, ledgerCanisterId, decimals) continue to work without regressions.

requirements.text: Display the token symbol glyphs for ckBTC, ckETH, and ckUSDC in the Dashboard Tokens section so users can visually distinguish tokens at a glance.

quotes: are you able to add  ck BTC ck ETH ck USDC  token symbols

acceptanceCriteria: In `frontend/src/components/dashboard/TokensSection.tsx`, each token row/card shows both the token ticker (ckBTC/ckETH/ckUSDC) and the configured glyph from the token config.
The glyph display is purely presentational (no new backend calls) and renders correctly in both light and dark themes.

requirements.text: Use the configured token symbol glyph consistently anywhere the token symbol is presented in the send/receive panels (headings, button text, and success messages), while keeping user-facing text in English.

quotes: are you able to add  ck BTC ck ETH ck USDC  token symbols

acceptanceCriteria: `frontend/src/components/dashboard/TokenReceivePanel.tsx` displays the token glyph alongside the token ticker in the main heading (e.g., "Your ₿ ckBTC Receiving Address" or similar).
`frontend/src/components/dashboard/TokenSendPanel.tsx` includes the glyph alongside the token ticker in the primary action button label and the success toast message.
All existing validation and disabled-state behavior remains unchanged.

constraints: Do not edit any files under `frontend/src/components/ui` (read-only Shadcn components).
No backend changes are required for this request.
nonGoals: Implementing real token transfer logic (the send flow can remain placeholder).
Adding new tokens beyond ckBTC, ckETH, and ckUSDC.
Adding third-party token icon packs or external image/CDN dependencies.
